family.reason: Kathisma and Vassiliki offer calm, shallow waters. Easy road access without a ferry.

couples.reason: Dramatic cliff beaches, sunset views, and quiet mountain villages

nightlife.reason: Lively in Nydri and Lefkada Town, quiet elsewhere

food.reason: Sofrito, kreatopita, Englouvi lentils, fresh seafood

beaches.reason: Porto Katsiki, Egremni, Kathisma — among the best in Greece

walking.reason: Mountain villages, Nydri waterfalls, coastal paths

quick_summary.en: The only Ionian island you can drive to — white limestone cliffs, turquoise beaches, world-class windsurfing, and authentic mountain villages.
quick_summary.el: Το μόνο ιόνιο νησί που μπορείς να οδηγήσεις — λευκοί ασβεστολιθικοί γκρεμοί, τιρκουάζ παραλίες, παγκόσμιας κλάσης windsurfing και αυθεντικά ορεινά χωριά.

pros: Driveable — no ferry required, causeway connects to mainland
World-class beaches: Porto Katsiki, Egremni, Kathisma
Top windsurfing destination in Vassiliki Bay
Authentic mountain villages with local food traditions
Boat trips to Meganisi, Scorpios, and surrounding islets
Good value compared to Mykonos or Santorini
cons: Very crowded in August, especially at western beaches
Western cliff beaches involve steep stair descents
Car essential — public transport is limited
Mountain roads are narrow and winding
insider_tips: Visit Porto Katsiki before 10:00 AM for calm water and fewer crowds
Dedicate separate mornings to Porto Katsiki and Egremni — doing both in one day is exhausting
Eat in Lefkada Town or the mountain villages, not in Nydri
Book accommodation months ahead for August
Take a boat trip from Nydri to see the cliff beaches from the water
Visit Vassiliki even if you don't windsurf — the bay has excellent swimming and fish tavernas
mistakes_to_avoid: Driving to Porto Katsiki in a large vehicle between 11:00–15:00 in August
Expecting Nydri to be a quiet or authentic port town
Underestimating the stair descents at Egremni (350 steps)
Skipping the mountain villages for the coast
Not booking accommodation early for peak season
